calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-13-2020 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash
Off Calendar Nov-14-2019 Advanced From Dec-06-19 To Dec-04-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash
Off Calendar Dec-04-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
David D. Schneider, Esq. of DOWLING AARON, INC., T:559.432.4500 x253, for defendant/moving party, on Court Call;
Catherine S. Robertson, Esq. of PAHL & MCCAY, T:408.918.2835, for plaintiff/opposing party, on Court Call.

RULING: Hearing held concurrently with Case CGC-19-578883. Plaintiff's counsel argues the personal jurisdiction issue. After arguments, the Court ruled as follows:

DEFENDANT MARQUEZ BOTHERS NEVADA, INC.'s Motion To Quash Service Of Summons is granted for reasons stated on the record.

Counsel for defendant is to prepare a proposed order that repeats the substantive portion of the Court's ruling, as stated on the record, and submit it in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com
